name: Rule Change: Side-by-Side Comparison
description: A direct comparison of traditional vs ERB approaches to business rule changes
author: ERB Team

scenes.title: The Clear Winner
scenes.summary:
When business rules live in one place, change is effortless.

Traditional: 4 hours, 4 systems, risk of inconsistency
ERB: 5 minutes, 1 change, guaranteed consistency

That's a 48x improvement in time alone.
lessons: Traditional = N systems means N times the work
Consistency is guaranteed, not hoped for
Rule changes become routine, not emergencies
Developer time is better spent on new features

title: Rule Change: Side-by-Side Comparison
